title: eval_summary
description: Phase M.4 artifact produced by EvalRunner. Aggregates per-pair eval_results into pipeline-run-level coverage / precision / review numbers, broken down by chunking_strategy, plus baseline-comparison fields used by RegressionGate.

agenda_coverage_std_deviation.description: Phase W.5 (schema 1.2.0): population std-dev of per-agenda coverage across non-excluded agendas in this run.

agenda_precision_std_deviation.description: Phase W.5 (schema 1.2.0): population std-dev of per-agenda precision across non-excluded agendas in this run.

flag_hidden_stratification.description: Phase W.5 (schema 1.2.0): True iff either std-deviation exceeds 0.20 -- warn in summary output.

pair_breakdown.description: Phase O.4 (schema 2.0.0): one entry per evaluated ground_truth_pair. Provenance carried so a low coverage number can be traced to specific source_ids / agendas.

per_source_metrics.description: Phase O.4 (schema 2.0.0): coverage / precision rolled up per source_id. Suppressed (null) when fewer than 2 distinct source_ids are present.

per_type_metrics.description: Phase T.5 (schema 2.0.0): precision / recall / F1 broken down by target_type. Suppressed (null) when any ground_truth pair lacks a target_type field; per_type_metrics_reason carries the explanation.

per_type_metrics_reason.description: Phase T.5: non-null only when per_type_metrics is null; explains why.

spurious_add_rate.description: Phase T.2: fraction of extracted items with grounding_verified=false across this run.

baseline_scope.description: Phase X2.4: tag on the eval_summary recording whether the baseline (if this summary is one) covers a single transcript or the full corpus. Null on non-baseline summaries.

grounding_overlap_p10.description: Phase T.2: 10th percentile of grounding_overlap_score across extracted items.

per_outcome_f1.description: Phase P1: F1 per decision_outcome (approval/deferral/...) from the deterministic two-stage alignment. Only present when at least one P1 pair fed the summary.

review_queue_count.description: Phase P1: count of extracted decisions that passed Stage 1 (outcome match) but failed Stage 2 (bidirectional text overlap).

alignment_threshold.description: Phase P1: the bidirectional similarity threshold used to gate matched/review_queue across the run.

prompt_version.description: Phase P2-B: SHA-256 digest of the extraction prompt template used by the meeting_extraction this summary scored. Null when no extraction artifact was loaded (legacy fixture path).

calibration_data.description: Phase P2-A: per-decision (confidence, aligned) records seeded for future ECE computation. With <30 decisions, ECE is not meaningful; the data is accumulated across runs.

calibration_note.description: Phase P2-A: human-readable summary of calibration_data: count and ECE-readiness.

judge_human_agreement_rate.description: Phase P2-C: fraction of decisions where judge verdict agrees with the human-confirmed GT outcome. Null when no judge_score artifact is present or no GT pairs carry ground_truth_pass.

judge_pass_rate.description: Phase P2-C: fraction of evaluated decisions that passed the judge (aggregate_pass_rate from the judge_score artifact). Null when no judge_score artifact is present.

judge_evaluated_count.description: Phase P2-C: count of decisions the judge scored. Zero when no judge_score artifact is present.

judge_calibration_note.description: Phase P2-C: human-readable summary of the judge calibration step (e.g. 'no judge_score artifact', 'no GT pairs with ground_truth_pass').
